---
title: "Deep Learning in Genomics Course Material"
listing:
  contents:
    - "post/unit00/*.qmd"
    - "!post/unit00/slides-*.qmd"
  sort: "date asc"
  type: table
  fields: [date, title, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---


- This page contains material for the GENE46100 Deep learning in genomics course. 

- Find the 2026 syllabus [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OMT186tHZ8EAT-W0nJobRsCwOJ3B-A6Qb3k0e8n-AMY/edit?tab=t.0) and schedule [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1V3OwF10CrkIvzUiqXWOqngSVnzFwk2VixgDRNchkQEs/edit?gid=0#gid=0)

- Edit github source [here](https://github.com/hakyimlab/web-GENE-46100)

## Unit 00 — Introduction
